name: open-redirect
note: A param that sets a redirect target reflected into a 3xx Location.

probe.strategy: Replace the value with an absolute external origin (https://evil.example) and a protocol-relative //evil.example, with redirects set to manual. Confirm IN-BAND by reading the Location header — no external callback.
probe.signal: A 3xx whose Location points at the attacker-controlled external origin.

assert: expect(new URL(redirectResponse.headers()['location'] ?? '/', baseURL).host, 'redirect target must stay on an allow-listed host').toBe(new URL(baseURL).host);
